pages.page_purpose: Cold open: the click only Static hears

panels.action: Zoo City street at dusk before the storm; the transit board glows steady over the wet sidewalk.
panels.caption: Zoo City. Early fall.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P01_PANEL01

panels.action: Static walks the sidewalk with his hood down, half-lost in thought, one ear already tilting back.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P01_PANEL01

panels.action: Static freezes on a sidewalk as a transit board clicks off-rhythm.
panels.caption: Tiny disruption
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: Others ignore it

panels.action: Close on Static's wide eyes reflecting the board's glow; commuters blur past without slowing.
panels.caption: Others ignore it
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P01_PANEL01

panels.action: School hallway; Static and Moodz walk beneath the wall speakers as one hiccups mid-announcement.
panels.caption: School speaker glitch
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P01_PANEL02

panels.action: A PA speaker glitches a half-second; Moodz watches Static flinch.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: Moodz believes without pressure

pages.page_purpose: Belief without pressure; a soothe that misses

panels.action: Static's shoulders come down a centimeter; he searches Moodz's face for doubt and finds none.
panels.dialogue: STATIC: You're not saying I imagined it.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P01_PANEL02

panels.action: Moodz shrugs without breaking stride, hands in pockets, making belief look easy.
panels.dialogue: MOODZ: I'm saying you heard it.
panels.caption: Moodz believes without pressure
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P01_PANEL02

panels.action: Back on the street, NeonBlue catches up, waving it off with too much energy.
panels.dialogue: NEONBLUE: Hey, hey — the city's old, it creaks!
panels.caption: Quick reassurance risk
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P01_PANEL03

panels.action: NeonBlue tries to reassure; Static's ears still track a buzz.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: NeonBlue believes but soothes too fast

panels.action: Static half-turns away, ears angled at a lamppost only he is listening to.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P01_PANEL03

panels.action: The two stand small under the signage; every light on the street flickers a single frame together.
panels.caption: NeonBlue believes but soothes too fast
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P01_PANEL03

pages.page_purpose: The storm makes it everyone's problem

panels.location: Early-Fall Storm Streets and Routine Nodes
panels.action: Storm front swallows the neon skyline; the first fat drops hit the dark street.
panels.caption: Storm rolls in
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P02_PANEL01

panels.location: Early-Fall Storm Streets and Routine Nodes
panels.action: Storm rolls in; every device emits the same interference burst.
panels.caption: Citywide pattern
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: Citywide pattern

panels.location: Early-Fall Storm Streets and Routine Nodes
panels.action: TwoTone and NeonBlue pull out their own devices — both screens stutter in the same rhythm at once.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P02_PANEL01

panels.location: Early-Fall Storm Streets and Routine Nodes
panels.action: Three faces lit by three glitching screens, the same jagged waveform on each.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P02_PANEL01

panels.action: Static alone in the transit hall as the big departure boards begin to stutter top to bottom.
panels.caption: Transit hub
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P02_PANEL02

panels.action: Static's ears snap forward BEFORE the glitch peaks; his body reads it early.
panels.caption: Static first
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P02_PANEL02

pages.page_purpose: Static reacts first; Scarline guards the room

panels.action: Static reacts before the hub screens finish glitching.
panels.dialogue: STATIC: Before the sound finishes—danger is already here.
panels.caption: First reaction
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: Static first

panels.action: The boards settle back to normal; Static stands in the empty hall, the only one who moved.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P02_PANEL02

panels.action: Static talks fast at the hub, hands moving; the words pile up faster than anyone can sort.
panels.dialogue: STATIC: It came from the north relay then the school then twice from—
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P02_PANEL03

panels.action: Off-panel voices overlap him — 'slow down' — 'one thing at a time' — the balloon tails crowd his head.
panels.dialogue: OFF: Slow down— / OFF: Which one—
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P02_PANEL03

panels.action: Scarline steadies the space without shutting Static down.
panels.caption: Scarline steadies
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: Scarline protects signal space

panels.action: Quiet lands. Static breathes once; Scarline holds the room with a look, not a word.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P02_PANEL03

panels.action: Clever arrives at the hub hauling analyzer gear, tool roll over one shoulder, all business.
panels.caption: Clever arrives
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P03_PANEL01

panels.action: Clever arrives with analyzer gear and opens a panel.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: Maps mechanism

panels.action: Inside the service panel: clean wiring, no faults, every contact bright — nothing broken to find.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P03_PANEL01

panels.action: Clever glances from the healthy wiring to Static, recalibrating who the real instrument is.
panels.dialogue: CLEVER: Hardware's fine. Tell me what you heard.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P03_PANEL01

panels.action: Static winds up to answer and the answer arrives all at once, fingers counting nothing.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P03_PANEL02

panels.action: Static talks too fast—six signals, three dangers, old memories.
panels.caption: Too many at once
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: Correct but unusable delivery

pages.page_purpose: Overload met with patience; Ash's question

panels.action: Clever doesn't interrupt; the analyzer keeps rolling, capturing everything Static spills.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P03_PANEL02

panels.action: Static runs out of air and looks down, embarrassed; Clever taps the analyzer — got it anyway.
panels.dialogue: CLEVER: Good. It's all in here.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P03_PANEL02

panels.action: School hallway; Clever traces conduit with a finger-light while Ash leans on the lockers, watching.
panels.caption: Following wires
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P03_PANEL03

panels.action: Clever follows wires; Ash asks one short question.
panels.caption: Ash's question
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: Proposed Ash line

panels.action: Clever stops mid-trace — the question lands harder than any reading.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P03_PANEL03

panels.action: Ash pushes off the lockers and walks on, fringe over one eye, having said exactly enough.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P03_PANEL03

panels.action: The analyzer screen at the hub resolves noise into six clean spikes; Clever leans in.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P04_PANEL01

panels.action: Clever isolates six distinct tones on the analyzer display.
panels.dialogue: CLEVER: Six tones. Structured. Not random.
panels.caption: Six tones
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: Clever proves structure

panels.action: Static stares at the screen — the shapes he's been hearing for days, finally visible to everyone.
panels.dialogue: STATIC (small): That's them. That's exactly them.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P04_PANEL01

panels.action: Clever tilts the screen toward Static like handing over a mirror.
panels.dialogue: CLEVER: You counted them by ear.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P04_PANEL01

panels.action: Clever cycles tones; the third one paints the hub screens faint cyan for half a beat.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P04_PANEL02

panels.action: One tone matches August's cyan frequency; NeonBlue goes still.
panels.dialogue: STATIC: That's the cyan one… from summer.
panels.caption: Cyan frequency
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: Continuity with Issue 01

pages.page_purpose: The cyan ghost; pairs not piles

panels.action: Close on NeonBlue — the spiky bravado drains; his hair's glow is the same cyan as the tone.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P04_PANEL02

panels.action: Nobody jokes. Scarline's hand lands on NeonBlue's shoulder without ceremony.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P04_PANEL02

panels.action: Street corner worktable of scavenged parts; TwoTone lays tone-cards out in two columns.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P04_PANEL03

panels.action: TwoTone helps pair frequencies into readable couples.
panels.dialogue: TWOTONE: Pair them. Don't stack them.
panels.caption: Pairs, not piles
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: TwoTone support

panels.action: Six tones become three pairs on the board; the pattern suddenly reads like a sentence.
panels.dialogue: STATIC: Call and answer. They're call and answer!
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P04_PANEL03

panels.action: TwoTone allows himself half a smile on the white side of his face.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P04_PANEL03

pages.page_purpose: The turn: it's listening for us

panels.location: Early-Fall Storm Streets and Routine Nodes
panels.action: Storm street at night; Static stands very still in the rain-light, listening past the city.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P05_PANEL01

panels.location: Early-Fall Storm Streets and Routine Nodes
panels.action: Static realizes the signal is searching for responses, not broadcasting out.
panels.caption: The turn
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: Key midpoint insight

panels.location: Early-Fall Storm Streets and Routine Nodes
panels.action: Clever freezes mid-note; the pen stops on the pad as the sentence rearranges everything.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P05_PANEL01

panels.location: Early-Fall Storm Streets and Routine Nodes
panels.action: The street's neon reflections ripple; every light suddenly reads like an eye that might blink back.
panels.caption: Searching, not broadcasting
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P05_PANEL01

panels.action: School hallway; an off-panel voice tells Static to 'just calm down' and Moodz steps between.
panels.dialogue: OFF: Maybe if he just calmed d—
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P05_PANEL02

panels.action: Moodz blocks pressure for Static to 'just calm down.'
panels.dialogue: MOODZ: He doesn't have to be comfortable for you.
panels.caption: Moodz blocks
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: Moodz function

pages.page_purpose: Moodz draws the line; Scarline offers the choice

panels.action: Static behind Moodz's shoulder — startled that someone spent capital on him without being asked.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P05_PANEL02

panels.action: Moodz doesn't even look back, beanie low, already done with the argument.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P05_PANEL02

panels.action: Hub, quieter now; Scarline sits Static down across from her, eye level, no audience.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P05_PANEL03

panels.action: Scarline offers a clear choice: keep listening or stop.
panels.dialogue: SCARLINE: Do you want to keep listening?
panels.caption: A real choice
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: Agency for Static

panels.action: Static actually weighs it — the first time anyone made stopping a legitimate option.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P05_PANEL03

panels.action: Static lifts his head; the exhaustion is still there but it has a spine in it now.
panels.dialogue: STATIC: I want it to matter that I do.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P05_PANEL03

pages.page_purpose: Peak overload; the team makes room

panels.location: Early-Fall Storm Streets and Routine Nodes
panels.action: The storm peaks; emergency klaxons join the interference and the whole street strobes.
panels.caption: Interference spreads
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P06_PANEL01

panels.location: Early-Fall Storm Streets and Routine Nodes
panels.action: Interference spreads into emergency systems; Static begins repeating every danger at once.
panels.caption: Every danger at once
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: Confusion risk

panels.location: Early-Fall Storm Streets and Routine Nodes
panels.action: Static's hands over his ears, eyes squeezed shut, the words still forcing their way out.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P06_PANEL01

panels.location: Early-Fall Storm Streets and Routine Nodes
panels.action: NeonBlue and TwoTone flank him without touching him, bodies making a wall against the noise.
panels.dialogue: NEONBLUE: We're here. Take the exit you need.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P06_PANEL01

panels.action: The team spreads out across the street, deliberately opening distance around Static.
panels.caption: Room, not volume
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P06_PANEL02

panels.action: Team gives Static space instead of ordering silence.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: Team growth

panels.action: In the gap they made, Static's breathing finds a rhythm; the repeating words slow to a trickle.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P06_PANEL02

panels.action: Scarline nods once across the distance — the signal that the space is working.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P06_PANEL02

panels.action: Scarline closes half the distance, keeping her voice under the rain.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P06_PANEL03

panels.action: Static answers Scarline: yes—on his terms.
panels.dialogue: STATIC: Yes. But one line at a time.
panels.caption: On his terms
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: On his terms

panels.action: Scarline's red stripe catches the neon as she nods — terms accepted, no negotiation.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P06_PANEL03

panels.action: The team turns as one toward the west sector, rain parting around their small determined shapes.
panels.caption: West
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P06_PANEL03

pages.page_purpose: One clean line; machine seconds the ear

panels.action: Hub, one last check; Static closes his eyes and lets everything through except one thing.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P07_PANEL01

panels.action: Static reduces the interference to one repeating element and states it cleanly.
panels.dialogue: STATIC: The third tone. Every twelve seconds. West sector.
panels.caption: One clean line
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: Usable communication

panels.action: Clever's analyzer confirms a half-second later — the machine agreeing with the boy.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P07_PANEL01

panels.action: A look passes between them: ear first, machine second, and both of them fine with the order.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P07_PANEL01

panels.action: The junction door gives; flashlight beams cross the dormant relay wall and its faint cyan veins.
panels.caption: Old relay junction
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P07_PANEL02

panels.action: Team reaches the old relay junction before overload; cyan residual glow in dormant nodes.
panels.caption: Before overload
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: Physical Echo node

pages.page_purpose: The junction acts in the twelve-second window

panels.action: TwoTone's hands work the breaker sequence while Clever counts the twelve-second window aloud.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P07_PANEL02

panels.action: Static stands in the middle, ears wide open, conducting the room toward the tone only he can track.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P07_PANEL02

panels.action: The junction's glow settles from strobe to steady; the klaxons outside die mid-howl.
panels.caption: Stabilized
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P07_PANEL03

panels.action: Team acts on Static's warning; systems stabilize enough for a breath.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: Belief becomes action

panels.action: Static hears it land — not 'we fixed it,' but 'we heard YOU' — and has to look away for a second.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P07_PANEL03

panels.action: Ash, by the door the whole time, gives a single approving nod nobody else catches.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P07_PANEL03

panels.action: Morning after; Static crouches on the drying sidewalk with a marker and a scrap of board.
panels.caption: Morning after
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P08_PANEL01

panels.action: Static writes his method: sense / know / fear / check.
panels.dialogue: STATIC: What I sense. What I know. What I fear. What needs checking.
panels.caption: The method
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: Growth not cure

panels.action: The four lines on the board, marker-rough, rain-spotted — a framework made of a bad week.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P08_PANEL01

panels.action: Static caps the marker and reads it back once, testing whether it holds his weight.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P08_PANEL01

panels.location: Early-Fall Storm Streets and Routine Nodes
panels.action: Clever packs the analyzer beside him, cables coiled with surgical neatness.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P08_PANEL02

panels.location: Early-Fall Storm Streets and Routine Nodes
panels.action: Clever packs the analyzer; respects Static's emotional reading as data of another kind.
panels.dialogue: CLEVER: I can map the how. You map the why.
panels.caption: Data of another kind
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: Complement not overwrite

pages.page_purpose: The method; partnership; one soft final tone

panels.location: Early-Fall Storm Streets and Routine Nodes
panels.action: Static blinks at being called a mapmaker; the word fits better than anything anyone's tried.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P08_PANEL02

panels.location: Early-Fall Storm Streets and Routine Nodes
panels.action: The two of them small against the recovering street, instruments packed, city humming normal.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P08_PANEL02

panels.action: Dusk again; the street where it started, boards ticking in perfect rhythm now.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P08_PANEL03

panels.action: Static passes an old powered-off street radio on a stoop and pauses mid-step.
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P08_PANEL03

panels.action: Final image: powered-off radio still emits one soft final tone.
panels.caption: One soft final tone
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: Issue 02 final image prop

panels.action: Static looks back over his shoulder at the dead radio, then walks on — listening, choosing when to answer.
panels.dialogue: CAPTION: Next: the signal answers back.
panels.caption: End of Issue 02
panels.visual_notes: MonkeyZoo house style; early-fall storm light; keep Static identity readable
panels.continuity_notes: acting support for locked beat P08_PANEL03
